column1: I think this is the______________(bad) job I've ever had.
My last job was much______________(good) than this one.
I had a lot__________(little) work there and my boss was really nice.
My boss here is the___________(strict) in the whole firm, and the working day is____________(long) than in my last job, too.
The_____________(good) thing about it is that the office is___________(close) to my house than the old one.
At least now I get home___________(early) than I used to.
